missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXII — Priests' Passage, on the floor before the Cloister save sphere. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE — walk past this and it's gone forever.
sgTip: Steal Lv. 1–2 Key Spheres from enemies in Bevelle to unlock path nodes for everyone.

subLocations.name: Priests' Passage
subLocations.prose: After the wedding scene and the escape sequences, the full party reunites in Bevelle Temple. Charge through several waves of Warrior Monks on the roof — the flamethrower monks hit the whole party with fire, so kill them first. Primer XXII is on the floor of the passage leading to the Cloister save sphere; the game pulls you forward here, so look down as you walk.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXII (floor before Cloister save sphere)

subLocations.name: Bevelle Cloister of Trials
subLocations.prose: The most mechanically complex Cloister — you ride a moving platform across glowing path glyphs, steering by pressing the button as arrows light up. The Destruction Sphere is needed to access the Knight Lance chest, which is one of the seven Cloister treasures required to unlock Anima later. Don't skip it.

items.name: Knight Lance (Kimahri, Destruction Sphere — needed for Anima)
